onset.Description: Time in seconds from the beginning of the recording to the start of the event.

duration.Description: Duration of the event in seconds.

sample.Description: Onset of the event in samples (relative to the start of the recording).

value.Description: Numeric trigger code emitted by the stimulus presentation system.

Levels.motivation: Individually important stimulus chosen by patient

stimulus.Description: Identifier of the stimulus presented (e.g., image name or word).

response_time.Description: Time from stimulus onset to participant's vocal response, in seconds.
